Features

Built to protect. Designed to be trusted.

Every feature in Guardian AI is purpose-built to keep you safe from modern phishing attacks.

🤖

AI Model Detection

A Random Forest classifier trained on 450,000+ URLs extracts 15 URL-based features to identify phishing patterns with 99% accuracy.

✅

Domain Whitelist

Major trusted domains like Google, WhatsApp, and GitHub are whitelisted to eliminate false positives and provide instant results.

🚨

Brand Impersonation Detection

Catches phishing sites that mimic trusted brands like iCloud, PayPal, and Apple — even when the AI model might miss them.

⚡

Real-time Analysis

Get results in seconds. No waiting, no delays. Paste a URL and Guardian analyses it instantly through our cloud API.

🕒

Scan History

Previously scanned URLs are highlighted automatically. Your last 3 weeks of scans are stored locally on your device — never on our servers.

🔒

Zero Data Collection

Guardian AI does not collect, store, or share any personal data. Your privacy is not a feature — it's a foundation.

How it works

Three layers. One mission.

Guardian AI runs every URL through a layered detection system designed to catch threats at every level.

1

Paste the URL

Copy any suspicious link and paste it into Guardian AI. No setup required.

2

Domain Check

Trusted domains are instantly verified against our whitelist. Known-safe sites skip straight to the result.

3

AI Analysis

15 URL features are extracted and run through our ML model — trained on 450,000+ real phishing and legitimate URLs.

4

Instant Result

Get a clear verdict: Safe or Phishing — with threat score, confidence, and explanation of why it was flagged.

Screenshots

Designed for clarity. Built for speed.

A clean, dark interface that gets out of your way and delivers results without friction.

99% Model accuracy on test data
450K+ URLs in training dataset
0.9955 ROC-AUC score
3 Detection layers (Whitelist + Brand + AI)
